title: Justice Refuses Valid Recusal Demand
description: A party petitions the Judicial Conduct Board to require a justice's recusal based on a financial conflict of interest. The Board directs recusal; the justice refuses. The refusal triggers an automatic referral and the justice is barred from the case under Art IV §7.3.

details.ground: undisclosed financial interest in a regulated entity before the Court

details.outcome: referred the matter for impeachment proceedings as conduct-based grounds for removal
